title: SAMS Odisha PG CPET 2026 - Overview

detail.title: SAMS Odisha PG CPET 2026 - Overview
detail.short_info: SAMS Odisha PG CPET Entrance Exam Date 2026 has been announced for admission to PG courses in Odisha universities and colleges. Check CPET 2026 exam schedule, application dates, eligibility, prospectus PDF and online form link at pg.samsodisha.gov.in.

content.text: The SAMS Odisha PG CPET Entrance Exam Date 2026 has been officially announced by the Higher Education Department, Government of Odisha. The Common Post Graduate Entrance Test (CPET) 2026 serves as the gateway for admission into various postgraduate courses offered by state universities and colleges across Odisha. Candidates aspiring for PG admissions can now check the exam dates, eligibility criteria, and apply online through the official SAMS portal at pg.samsodisha.gov.in.

rows: Student Academic Management System (SAMS), Higher Education Department, Odisha
State-level entrance test for PG admission

sections.heading: Important Dates for SAMS Odisha PG CPET 2026
SAMS Odisha PG CPET 2026 - Application Links

items: Apply Online: Click Here
Applicant Login: Click Here
Download Notification PDF: Click Here
Download Prospectus: Click Here
Official Website: Click Here
Educational Qualification: Candidates must have completed a Bachelor’s degree in a relevant discipline from a recognized university.
Minimum Marks: Generally, 45-50% aggregate marks required (varies by subject/university).
Final Year Students: Candidates appearing in the final semester of graduation are eligible to apply.
Domicile: Must be a resident of Odisha or fulfill specific university policies for other-state applicants.

sections.heading: How to Apply for SAMS Odisha PG CPET 2026 Online

items: Visit the official SAMS PG portal at pg.samsodisha.gov.in.
Click on “New User Registration” and create an applicant profile.
Login using credentials and fill in educational, academic, and subject preference details.
Upload the required documents, photograph, and signature.
Pay the application fee through online payment gateways.
Submit the application and print a copy for reference.
Mode of Exam: Offline (OMR-based)
Type of Questions: Multiple Choice (MCQs)
Total Marks: 70 marks (subject paper)
Time Duration: 90 minutes
Selection Process: Based on CPET marks + career marks (graduation and +2 level)

sections.heading: How to Download SAMS Odisha CPET Admit Card 2026

items: Visit pg.samsodisha.gov.in.
Click on the “Admit Card” link once activated.
Enter your registration number and password.
Download and print the admit card for exam day verification.
CPET 2026 Admit Card
Original ID proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, etc.)
Recent passport-size photographs
Graduation marksheet and certificate
Category and domicile certificate (if applicable)
